pi_items.source: setup_task.sh creates the project with identifier 'community-support' and export_result.sh checks it.
task.json specifies this board name and export_result.sh checks for its creation.

pi_items.metadata_value: Strictly for technical support and bug reports
pi_items.verified_value: Strictly for technical support and bug reports
pi_items.source: task.json specifies this description and export_result.sh asserts this exact string.
setup_task.sh dynamically creates a thread with this subject and export_result.sh asserts it was moved.
setup_task.sh dynamically creates a thread with this subject and export_result.sh asserts it was locked.

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on synthetically generated data within a Redmine environment. The target project identifier is 'community-support'. The agent is required to create a new board named 'Technical Q&A' with the description 'Strictly for technical support and bug reports'. A thread titled 'Connection Refused on Port 8080' must be moved to the new board, and another thread titled 'Weekly Sync Notes - Jan 2024' must be locked.
